allow: Bash(node -e "const fs = require\('fs'\); const data = fs.readFileSync\(process.env.HOME + '/.claude/.mcp.json', 'utf8'\); JSON.parse\(data\); console.log\('JSON 语法正确'\); console.log\('服务器数量:', Object.keys\(JSON.parse\(data\).mcpServers\).length\); Object.keys\(JSON.parse\(data\).mcpServers\).forEach\(k => console.log\('  -', k\)\)")
